meta.title: Meatguy Steakhouse | Premium Dry-Aged Steak Experience
meta.description: Where Passion Meets Perfection. Reservasi dan inquiry via WhatsApp — Meatguy Bintaro & SCBD.

hero.headline: Where Passion Meets Perfection
hero.tagline:
An Experience Awaits.
Reserve your table or allow us to assist you.

founder.title: Dimsthemeatguy
founder.subtitle: The visionary behind Meatguy Steakhouse
founder.name: Dimas Ramadhan Pangestu
paragraphs: Known as Dimsthemeatguy, started with a passion for meat and sharing it. Since 2020, he has built a loyal community through honest content about beef and grilling. His journey led him to judge the World Steak Challenge in 2024 and 2025. Today, it all comes to life in Meatguy Steakhouse, driven by passion, precision, and fire.

chef.title: Executive Chef & Meat Master Meatguy Steakhouse
chef.name: Chef Teuku Wahyudi
chef.subtitle: El Patrón
paragraphs: For Chef Teuku Wahyudi, steak is more than food, it's passion. Known as El Patrón in the kitchen, he treats every cut with respect and every flame with purpose. At Meatguy Steakhouse, he believes great steak comes from the heart, not just heat.

about.title: About Meatguy Steakhouse
paragraphs: At Meatguy Steakhouse, everything begins with passion and craftsmanship. We serve the finest cuts, prepared with precision and respect for flavor. Beyond dining, we offer an experience that lingers beyond the last bite. In 2025, we are honored to be ranked No. 90 on the World's 101 Best Steak Restaurants, reflecting our pursuit of excellence.

awards.title: Recognition
paragraphs: At Meatguy Steakhouse, everything begins with passion and craftsmanship. We select only the finest cuts and prepare each with care, precision, and respect for flavor.
More than just a meal, we aim to create an experience, one that stirs your senses and lingers long after the last bite.
In 2025, we are honored to be ranked No. 90 on the World's 101 Best Steak Restaurants, a recognition that reflects our continued pursuit of excellence in every cut we serve.
